FreeAgent:

Building a Guitar in Second Life

Posted on 21 September 2007 by Johannes Fahrenkrug. Tags: Programming Second Life
I've been messing around with Second Life a bit lately. The inwold Dr. Dobb's Life 2.0 conference finally made me create an account. There is still a lot for me to learn and to discover. I'm especially interested in programming Second Life, of course. This video gives you a glimpse of the cool stuff you can do with Second Life: Doesn't that wanna make you create all kinds of things? I've you've never used Second Life before, this little introduction will give you an idea of what it's like:
